votes.motion_text: Motion to approve the agenda as written
votes.source_snippet: Ms. McKeever made a motion to approve the agenda as written. The motion was seconded by Mr. Caponegro. The motion was unanimously carried.

votes.motion_text: Motion to approve the agenda as written
votes.source_snippet: Mr. Caponegro made a motion to approve the agenda as written. The motion was seconded by Ms. Iglesias. The motion was unanimously carried.

votes.motion_text: Motion to approve the minutes of the January 8, 2019 Combined Public Hearing and Board Meeting as written
votes.source_snippet: Ms. McKeever made a motion to approve the minutes of the January 8, 2019 Combined Public Hearing and Board Meeting as written. Mr. Torres seconded the motion. The motion was carried with one abstention (Ms. Viera).

votes.motion_text: Motion to approve the plaza plan
votes.source_snippet: Mr. Bruzaitis made a motion to approve the plaza plan. The motion was seconded by Mr. Caponegro. The motion was unanimously carried.

votes.motion_text: Motion to support the committee's recommendation for BSA Application# 2018-191-BZ; 215 North 10th Street
votes.source_snippet: Ms. Teague made a motion to support the committee's recommendation. The motion was seconded by Ms. Iglesias. The vote was as follows: 32 "YES"; 0 "NO"; 1 "ABSTENTION" (Mr. Needelman). The motion was carried.

votes.source_snippet: Mr. Burrows made a motion to support the recommendation. The motion was seconded by Mr. Bachorowski. The motion was unanimously carried, The vote was: The vote of the board was as follows: 34 "YES"; 0 "NO"; 0 "ABSTENTIONS"; 0 "RECUSALS".

public_speakers.name: Cory Kantin
public_speakers.topic: Concerns with development at the former Con Edison property at North 3rd Street and River Street; opposition to site's potential rezoning
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Cory Kantin, from "Friends of the Northside Waterfront", spoke about concerns with development at the former Con Edison property at North 3rd Street and River Street. They are opposed to the site's potential rezoning.

government_announcements.source_snippet:
Mr. Pierre, from the Comptroller's office, addressed the members. He noted that the Comptroller
is concerned about affordable housing
government_announcements.name: Mr. Pierre
